items.title: Amgen (AMGN) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
items.description: Amgen Inc. delivered strong operational performance across the board in 2025, and you can see that in the breadth of our business.  Three of these, Repatha, Evenity, and TestSpire, all grew by more than 30% year over year in 2025.

items.title: Amgen Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
items.description: Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) executives highlighted broad-based growth in 2025 and laid out expectations for continued momentum in 2026, while also detailing pipeline priorities, portfolio decisions, and a regulatory dialogue related to Tavneos during the company’s fourth-quarter earnings call. 2025 results

items.title: Here's What Key Metrics Tell Us About Amgen (AMGN) Q4 Earnings
items.description: Although the revenue and EPS for Amgen (AMGN) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended December 2025, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

items.title: Amgen (AMGN) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
items.description: Amgen (AMGN) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +11.18% and +4.23%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2025. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

items.title: Amgen Eyes Buy Zone After Fourth-Quarter Beat As Obesity Studies Mount
items.description: Amgen stock popped late Tuesday — and could retake its buy zone — after the biotech behemoth easily topped fourth-quarter expectations on the back of big sales beats from cholesterol drug Repatha and osteoporosis treatment Prolia.  The company also reaffirmed its bullish plans for obesity treatment MariTide.  In after-hours trades on today's stock market, Amgen stock rose more than 1% to 343.
